name: Mehet-Weret
description: Mehet-Weret, whose name translates to 'Great Swimmer' or 'Great Cow,' is an ancient Egyptian celestial cow goddess. She represents the primeval waters of creation from which the sun god Ra was born. Depicted as a cow or a woman with the head of a cow, often wearing a sun disk between her horns, Mehet-Weret is a powerful symbol of fertility, motherhood, and the cyclical nature of life and death. She is considered the mother of the sun god, giving birth to him each morning and swallowing him each evening, representing the daily journey of the sun across the sky and its nightly return to the underworld. Her association with the primeval waters connects her to the very beginning of the cosmos and the potential for new life and creation. Mehet-Weret's role as a protective mother goddess extends beyond Ra, as she is also seen as a nurturing figure for all life. She embodies the nurturing and life-giving aspects of the cosmos, representing the fertile waters that sustain the world. Her imagery evokes a sense of cosmic order and the continuous cycle of renewal that is central to Egyptian cosmology. While not as widely worshipped as some other major Egyptian deities, Mehet-Weret held a significant place in the ancient Egyptian understanding of the universe and the origins of life.
subtitle: Great Swimmer, Celestial Cow Goddess

keyMyths.title: Birth of Ra
keyMyths.description: Mehet-Weret gives birth to the sun god Ra from the primeval waters. This act symbolizes the daily rebirth of the sun and the cyclical nature of time.

keyMyths.title: Cosmic Mother
keyMyths.description: As a cosmic mother, Mehet-Weret is associated with the nurturing and protective aspects of the universe. She ensures the continuation of life and the balance of the cosmos.

keyMyths.title: Swallowing the Sun
keyMyths.description: Mehet-Weret swallows Ra each evening, representing the sun's journey into the underworld. This symbolizes the cyclical nature of death and rebirth.

sources.author: Richard H. Wilkinson

sources.description: A comprehensive overview of Egyptian deities.
